requirements.text: Repository have a .gitignore excluding build artifacts, macOS system files, scraped website data, and IDE files
The overlay render a live keyboard layout above all applications without intercepting clicks
The overlay read real-time keypresses and layer changes from the ZSA Voyager via hidapi/HID bridge
The overlay chrome auto-fade after inactivity and re-appear on keypress
Layout data be loadable from HAR capture files
